properties.entry: SELECT a FROM r WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM s);
SELECT a FROM r WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM s WHERE r.a = s.c);
SELECT a FROM r x WHERE x.a = (SELECT max(a) FROM r y);
SELECT a FROM r x WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM r y WHERE x.a = y.a AND EXISTS (SELECT * FROM r z WHERE z.a = x.a AND z.a = y.a));
SELECT * FROM r x WHERE EXISTS (SELECT y.a FROM r y) AND EXISTS (SELECT z.a FROM r z);
SELECT * FROM r x WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM r i WHERE EXISTS (SELECT c FROM s) AND i.a <= (SELECT sum(e) FROM t WHERE t.e = i.a));
SELECT * FROM r x WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM r i WHERE EXISTS (SELECT c FROM s) AND EXISTS (SELECT e FROM t));
